tmux:cursor.cup-boundaries.note: tmux reinterprets CUP coordinates within its own grid, boundary behavior differs

tmux:device.decrpm.note: tmux intercepts DECRPM — responds for its own modes, not the outer terminal

tmux:device.term-features.note: tmux does not pass through XTGETTCAP terminal-features query

tmux:device.tertiary-da.note: tmux intercepts DA3 and does not forward it to the outer terminal

tmux:device.xtgettcap.note: tmux intercepts XTGETTCAP queries for its own terminfo, not the outer terminal's

tmux:extensions.kitty-graphics.note: tmux does not support kitty graphics protocol pass-through

tmux:extensions.kitty-keyboard.note: tmux has partial kitty keyboard support (since 3.4) but probe detects incomplete implementation

tmux:extensions.osc10-fg-color.note: tmux intercepts OSC 10 (foreground color query) and returns its own value

tmux:extensions.osc11-bg-color.note: tmux intercepts OSC 11 (background color query) and returns its own value

tmux:extensions.osc1337-capabilities.note: iTerm2-specific protocol not supported by tmux

tmux:extensions.osc1337-cellsize.note: iTerm2-specific protocol not supported by tmux

tmux:modes.origin.note: tmux's DECOM handling differs from direct terminal — origin mode not fully passed through

screen:device.decrpm.note: Screen does not support DECRPM (mode reporting)

screen:device.decrqss.note: Screen does not support DECRQSS (setting reporting)

screen:device.term-features.note: Screen does not support XTGETTCAP terminal-features query

screen:device.tertiary-da.note: Screen does not forward DA3 to the outer terminal

screen:device.xtversion.note: Screen does not support XTVERSION query

screen:editing.repeat-char.note: Screen does not support REP (repeat character)

screen:extensions.kitty-graphics.note: Screen does not support kitty graphics protocol

screen:extensions.kitty-keyboard.note: Screen does not support kitty keyboard protocol

screen:extensions.osc10-fg-color.note: Screen does not pass through OSC 10 color queries

screen:extensions.osc11-bg-color.note: Screen does not pass through OSC 11 color queries

screen:extensions.osc1337-capabilities.note: iTerm2-specific protocol not supported by Screen

screen:extensions.osc1337-cellsize.note: iTerm2-specific protocol not supported by Screen

screen:extensions.reflow.note: Screen does not support text reflow on resize

screen:extensions.sixel.note: Screen does not support sixel graphics

screen:scrollback.alt-screen.note: Screen's alternate screen buffer handling differs — scrollback not fully preserved

screen:text.tab.note: Screen's tab handling may differ from direct terminal

screen:text.wide.emoji.note: Screen 4.x has limited Unicode width awareness — emoji rendered as narrow

screen:text.wide.emoji-vs16.note: Screen 4.x does not handle VS16 emoji variation selectors

screen:text.wide.emoji-zwj.note: Screen 4.x does not handle ZWJ emoji sequences

screen:unicode.grapheme-cursor.note: Screen 4.x does not support grapheme cluster cursor positioning

screen:unicode.tab-stops.note: Screen's tab stop handling differs from direct terminal
